name: Avery School Trnsprtn Inc
recent_news: Closed doors after 90 years per Facebook announcement; business and 9-coach fleet (valued ~$1.7M) was listed for sale on BizBuySell as Avery Transportation Inc, 3rd-gen family charter co. since 1930
fit_notes: Likely not a viable tuck-in: business reportedly closed and was primarily a charter/coach operator (athletics + camps) rather than a daily home-to-school yellow-bus contractor. Asset purchase of 9 coaches possible but limited route base in NE PA (Wayne County).

name: Central Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: likely Coudersport Area SD / Potter County districts (unconfirmed)
recent_news: No web footprint, news, or M&A signal found; small Potter County PA operator with no website or PR coverage
fit_notes: Very small (31 emp / ~$1.3M rev) single-location operator in rural Potter County PA. No digital presence makes outreach hard, but micro-operators of this size are exactly the family-owned tuck-in profile if Summit is expanding into PA Tier 3/4 counties. Worth a cold call via the Coudersport SD.

name: Eastern Pocono Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: likely East Stroudsburg Area SD or Stroudsburg Area SD (Monroe County, PA) - unconfirmed
recent_news: No web footprint found; not listed among publicly-named Pocono contractors (Pocono Mtn SD uses First Student; Palmeri Group also serves region)
fit_notes: Small Monroe County, PA operator with no public footprint. Stroudsburg is an active student-transport market (Pocono Mtn SD recently outsourced to First Student). If still operating, could be a discreet family-owned tuck-in for Summit's PA platform; needs phone-based diligence.

name: King Bus Transportation Co
districts_or_customers: likely Delaware County PA school districts (Southeast Delco, Penn-Delco, Interboro) - unconfirmed
recent_news: No specific news found. Note: King Limo Inc / King Transportation in King of Prussia, PA is a separate, larger limo/charter operator (200+ vehicles, 40+ yrs) - NOT the same entity as this Folcroft address
fit_notes: Small Folcroft (Delaware County, PA) school-bus operator with no web presence; dense Philadelphia-suburb district base would be attractive for Summit. Must distinguish from King Limo Inc (King of Prussia) which is a sedan/limo operator, not a tuck-in target. Diligence via PA Dept of State entity search recommended.

name: National Automated Bus Svc-De
districts_or_customers: likely Wallingford-Swarthmore SD or Delaware County PA districts - unconfirmed (note: W-S SD runs its own fleet of 39 buses)
recent_news: No news, website, or M&A signal found. Name suffix '-De' suggests Delaware County PA designation; not affiliated with PA automated stop-arm enforcement program (BusPatrol) or NSTA
fit_notes: Small Delaware County PA single-location operator with zero digital footprint. Swarthmore/Delco district base attractive for Summit's PA platform but the W-S SD self-operates, so customer base is unclear. Likely needs PA corporate filings lookup and direct outreach; speculative tuck-in candidate at best.
